environment.notes: Token usage not directly exposed by Cursor CLI; timing is wall-clock.

project_analysis.description: Clone and analyze target project structure

spec_generation.description: Reverse-engineer OpenSpec specifications from source code (3 parallel subagents)

sdd_development.description: SDD end-to-end code generation (4 parallel subagents: Go types, Go packages, Python, Infrastructure)

validation.description: Validate generated code against original project

totals.notes: Cursor CLI does not expose per-request token counts. Wall-clock time only.
